name: Donerksela -Sacred Area-
short_description: Pass to Ordeal and become the God!! You become the Guardian on a certain place, and management that dominion. Defeat the attacking enemy through the "produce resource", "enhance build" and more. If growing to adult appearance, then should be fight on an equal footing with strong Bosses.
detailed_description:
"Donerksela Sacred Area" is Turn based simulation game.

You are the Candidate God and Guardian on a certain place, fight the attacking enemy.

The game's goal is defeat strong Bosses and become the God, through the "produce resource", "enhance build" and more.

Main character (Fatima) is able to Growing if certain conditions are met!!

Growing can gain more powerful, that be advantageous about game progress.

In addition, Sometimes transform appearance for more sacred or evil.

Of course, each appearance has its own appearance at different age!

Enhance by Study(research) that spend the resource.

And exists Passive Item that exert various effects.

Enhance ally side utilize every element.

Maybe you can defeat Boss in one blow.

As a loop element, able to freely make the game easier or harder (to some extent).

And you can check past statistical information and achievement!

The game unfolds differently each time, so you can play it multiple times.

(There are also 2x and 4x speed modes to help you play multiple times!)
